_comment_DELETE_THIS_LINE: This is a template. Copy the contents (without these _comment lines) into a new file when publishing. See WORKFLOW.md for full instructions.
_id_help: Three-digit number, must match filename. e.g. 042 for the 42nd story
author: First name or 'Anonymous'
_author_help: How they want to be credited. Whatever they told you.
_location_help: Optional. Empty string '' if not provided.
_year_help: Optional. Empty string '' if not provided.
_tags_help: Pick from: hospital, home, birth-center, water-birth, c-section, vbac, induction, unmedicated, epidural, premature, twins, surrogacy, adoption, loss, first-baby, rainbow-baby
_content_notes_help: e.g. 'medical trauma, hemorrhage'. Empty if none.
_language_help: BCP-47 code: en, fa, ar, nl, zh, ja, es, pt, fr, de, he, hi, etc.
_share_allowed_help: false ONLY if they opted out of social sharing. Default true.
_license_help: Default is 'all-rights-reserved' (author retains all rights; project has a non-exclusive grant; readers can link and briefly quote but cannot republish). See Terms page on the site for the full version.
_audio_help: audio_url is empty '' for text-only. For audio stories paste the Cloudinary URL ending in .webm/.mp3/.mp4. duration is in seconds.
_cover_image_help: Optional. Cloudinary URL of the cover image. Empty string '' if the story has no image. Submitter-uploaded; verify it doesn't show identifiable children before publishing.
body: The story text. Use HTML if from the rich editor. Or plain text with double-newline paragraph breaks.
_body_help: For audio-only stories, body can be empty string ''.
